profile.title: My Profile
profile.avatarHint: JPG, PNG or GIF. Max 2 MB.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Deleting your account is permanent. All your data will be lost.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: This action is irreversible. Enter your password to confirm.

default.title: Party Planner — Platform for event organizers
default.description: Party Planner is the all-in-one platform built for event organizers (agencies and freelancers). Manage events, guests, budgets, quotes and mobile payments in one place.

landing.title: All-in-one platform for event organizers
landing.description: Centralize your events, guests, budgets and quotes. Built for event agencies and independent planners in Congo and French-speaking Africa.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to your Party Planner account to manage events, guests and quotes.

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Create your Party Planner account for free and start organizing events in minutes.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Reset your Party Planner password by email or OTP code.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your Party Planner account.

otp.title: OTP verification
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent by email, SMS or WhatsApp.

plans.title: Pricing and plans
plans.description: Discover Party Planner plans for independent organizers and event agencies.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to a plan
subscribe.description: Complete your subscription using MTN Mobile Money or Airtel Money.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your events, tasks and key metrics.

events.title: My events
events.description: Manage all your current and past events.

eventCreate.title: Create event
eventCreate.description: Plan a new wedding, birthday, baby shower or other celebration.

eventDetails.title: Event details
eventDetails.description: Track guests, tasks and budget for this event.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.description: Track and manage your sent invitations.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: All your Party Planner notifications and alerts in one place.

subscriptions.title: My subscriptions
subscriptions.description: History and management of your Party Planner subscriptions.

profile.title: My profile
profile.description: Manage your personal information and profile picture.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your Party Planner account, language, security and preferences.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or is no longer available.

hero.title: The all-in-one platform for event organizers
hero.subtitle: Centralize your events, guests, budgets and quotes in a single tool built for pros — in Congo and French-speaking Africa.
hero.trustNote: MTN Mobile Money and Airtel Money payments built in

features.title: Everything you need to deliver a successful event
features.subtitle: From planning to the big day, without juggling ten different tools.

events.title: Event management
events.description: Weddings, birthdays, baby showers, parties… Track each event from brief to recap.

guests.title: Guests and RSVP
guests.description: Guest lists, plus-ones, dietary restrictions, RSVP tracking via email, SMS or WhatsApp.

budget.title: Budget by category
budget.description: Estimated, actual, paid. See your margins in real time across each category.

tasks.title: Tasks and collaboration
tasks.description: Assign tasks to your team, set deadlines, track progress together.

checkin.title: Tablet check-in
checkin.description: Scan guest QR codes on the big day from a tablet. Fast, reliable, no flaky network needed.

quotes.title: Quotes and offers
quotes.description: Send a custom quote via a secure link. Clients sign and pay online.

agencies.title: Event agencies
agencies.description: Centralize your clients, quotes and events. Coordinate your team. Track your margins.

freelancers.title: Independent organizers
freelancers.description: One platform to deliver your services with the polish of a large agency.

cta.title: Ready to scale your business?
cta.subtitle: Create your account in under two minutes. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: The platform for event organizers across French-speaking Africa.
